markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review pipeline progress and define a path for continued improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=34.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The PSEO ketamine pipeline (V3) is nearly hitting all targets, a major improvement over V2's misclassifications.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [Slow research times (e.g., 54 min) are outliers caused by external server timeouts, not pipeline issues; the team is aware.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [Use the "Convergence Report" in Flow Studio to find and fix instruction ambiguities that cause inefficient iteration churn.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
  - [Request the "Evaluation Report" be added to the Atlas UI for the proofreader step, as it's a critical tool for identifying pipeline gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)

## Topics

### Pipeline Performance & Debugging

  - [Kalil's PSEO ketamine pipeline (V3) is nearly hitting all targets, a significant improvement over V2's misclassifications.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [A key fix was adding a classification structure to help the pipeline triage articles correctly.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [**Research Time:** A 54-minute research run was identified as an outlier.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
      - [**Cause:** Matthew's Temporal analysis confirmed it was an external server timeout, not a pipeline flaw.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1043.0)
      - [**Context:** The researcher is the only agent with internet access; its speed is not directly controllable by pipeline instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
      - [**Guidance:** Focus on the quality of the final article, not just speed. A fast pipeline producing bad content is useless.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)

### Tools for Optimization

  - [**Convergence Report (Flow Studio):** This report flags instruction ambiguities that cause inefficient iteration churn.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
      - [**Example:** It found inconsistent word count targets and a missing URL for a required anchor text link.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
      - [**Action:** Clarifying these instructions can reduce the number of drafting iterations, speeding up the pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
  - [**Evaluation Report (Proofreader Step):** This report is a critical tool for identifying pipeline gaps.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
      - [**Problem:** It's visible in Flow Studio but missing from the Atlas UI in some pipelines.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
      - [**Solution:** Request the pipeline builder to add the `evaluation_report` field to the proofreader step's output in Atlas.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Path for Continued Improvement

  - [**Process:** Kalil's current method is effective: manually edit outputs, document changes, and use that data to refine pipeline instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
  - [**Focus:** Shift from structural tasks to higher-level strategic thinking.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1973.0)
      - [**Rationale:** LLMs excel at information delivery but struggle with narrative and storytelling.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1981.0)
      - [**Goal:** Use pipeline automation to create capacity for strategic work, such as proactively developing content clusters for future product launches.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=2023.0)
  - [**Upcoming Tool:** Matthew is polishing a "Content Audit Pipeline" that will analyze content for AI cruft, narrative flow, and storytelling.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
      - [**Benefit:** Provides a rubric for editorial quality and pinpoints specific areas for pipeline improvement.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
      - [**Action:** Kalil will be a beta tester.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Kalil:**](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
      - [Use the Convergence Report to find and fix instruction ambiguities in the PSEO ketamine pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1350.0)
      - [Request the pipeline builder add the "Evaluation Report" to the proofreader step's output in the Atlas UI.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1498.0)
      - [Continue documenting manual edits to inform future pipeline improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)
      - [Begin beta testing the Content Audit Pipeline when available.](https://fathom.video/share/CnNJJuHqwLg48DVFFUhEe-1x8TUBSG1y?tab=summary&timestamp=2208.0)
